v1.0.0.description: # AP-Rummy v1.0.0 ## What is this - This is a web playable card game made for the archipelago game yam 2026 based on classic rummy rules - The goal of the game is to merge cards so create straits or melds ## How to play? - Download [ap-world and yaml] (https://github.com/Miiroun/ap-rummy/releases) - Generate multiworld - Head to [ap-rummy](https://miiroun.github.io/ap-rummy/) and start playing
v1.0.0.title: AP-Rummy v1.0.0
